title: qrafty's Japanese Villages
description: The pack adds beautiful cozy villages and structures into the  cherry blossom biome! 🌸
body:
# More life in the cherry blossom biome. 🪷
Ever since the cherry blossom biome was introduced, we all wondered why mojang didn't added a single structure to it. So I changed that with this pack! Enjoy these beautiful cozy japanese touched villages and 7 additional structures in your world! 🌸

![TITLE IMAGE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68100eae6209814ff656891c2b49fb14e2e0a21_0.webp)

**Including:** 20+ custom vanilla-like structures generating random with each other. 

**Locate the villages by running:**

```
  /locate structure qrafty:tsumago
```

<details>
<summary>List of the additional structures (click)</summary>
1. Cabin
2. Teahouse
3. Gateway
4. Bridge
5. Geode
6. Pond
7. Treehouse

</details>


![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a250108b13f3501a4d957024dd1abe6d2312a7c.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)

**This pack is part of my main pack [qraftyfied!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied)**
